firecrawl.markdown:
La Plazuela + Califato ¾. Icónica Fest
======================================

[Ver todos los eventos](https://visitasevilla.es/ahora-en-sevilla/)

21.06.26 ![](http://tic.visitasevilla.es/vsev/web_php/imatges/esdeveniments/30879698c3a4e2ed03512685301.gif)

La Plazuela regresa con su mezcla única de raíz, electrónica y verdad para una noche muy especial en la Plaza de España de Sevilla. Su sonido y su puesta en escena convierte al grupo granaíno en una de las propuestas más esperadas de la edición. Y no llegan solos, Califato ¾, referentes del folclore andaluz, se suma a esta noche icónica.

[Tickets](https://iconicafest.com/la-plazuela-califato/)

Lo que necesitas saber está en tu correo

hasDescription.longDescription: La Plazuela returns with its unique blend of roots, electronic, and truth for a very special night at Plaza de España in Seville. Their sound and stage presence make the Granada group one of the most anticipated proposals of the edition. And they are not coming alone, Califato ¾, references of Andalusian folklore, join this iconic night.
hasDescription.shortDescription: Concert of La Plazuela and Califato ¾ at Plaza de España.

hasAdditionalInformation.accessTip: Make sure to check your email for more information.
hasAdditionalInformation.curiosities: La Plazuela is known for its fusion of styles.

frequentlyAskedQuestion.question: Is it necessary to buy tickets?
frequentlyAskedQuestion.answer: No, entry is free but registration is recommended.

hasAdditionalInformation.remarks: It is recommended to arrive early to secure a good spot.

hasDescription.longDescription: References of Andalusian folklore, Califato ¾ joins La Plazuela for an iconic night.

hasAdditionalInformation.accessTip: Arrive early to secure a good spot.
hasAdditionalInformation.curiosities: Califato ¾ is known for its innovative approach to folklore.

frequentlyAskedQuestion.question: Are there age restrictions?
frequentlyAskedQuestion.answer: No, it is an event suitable for all ages.

hasDescription.longDescription: Califato ¾ is a musical group that mixes Andalusian folklore with modern rhythms.

La Plazuela returns with its unique blend of roots, electronic, and truth for a very special night at Plaza de España in Seville. Their sound and stage presence make the Granada group one of the most anticipated proposals of the edition. And they are not coming alone, Califato ¾, references of Andalusian folklore, join this iconic night.
hasDescription.shortDescription: Concert of La Plazuela and Califato ¾ at Plaza de España.
